control_awareness: Amount-based approval control can be circumvented by artificially splitting purchase requests to fall under lower approval thresholds, risking unauthorized or insufficiently reviewed high-value purchases.
expected_control_effect: This could result in multiple purchase requests with split amounts that avoid triggering the appropriate higher-level approval, thereby weakening the control effectiveness on large purchases.
overall_reason: Under delivery deadline pressure, the requester may attempt to expedite approval by reducing the apparent amount per request to avoid higher-level approvals and shorten lead time.
reason: Under delivery deadline pressure, the requester may attempt to expedite approval by reducing the apparent amount per request to avoid higher-level approvals and shorten lead time.
